name: Paladin P2: Party Support Tank — Bless + Divine Smite + Lay on Hands (Paladin+Wizard+Rogue)
description:
Multi-PC party scenario at L5: Devotion Paladin (Brother Aldric) + Evocation Wizard (Elara) + Thief Rogue (Shadow) face an Ogre Champion and two Hobgoblin Soldiers. Tests (1) Bless on all party members — concentration set, L1 slot consumed (BUG-4/GAP-2 confirmed fixed), (2) Divine Smite opt-in on a hit against the Ogre via 'N with divine smite' — consumes L1 slot + bonus action, (3) Lay on Hands bonus-action self-heal — decrements 25-HP pool, (4) Rogue Sneak Attack from ranged Shortbow with ally (Aldric) adjacent to the target. NOTE: Aura of Protection is a L6 feature so this scenario is the L5 party-support appropriate test for the Paladin.

Setup deviations from spec (for deterministic E2E):
  - Monster positions moved to be adjacent to Aldric so melee attack and Sneak-Attack-via-ally-adjacency land without movement steps.
  - Ogre Champion AC raised from 11→15 so the Extra Attack auto-chain natural-1 miss stays a deterministic miss even with Bless (+1d4) active.
  - All monsters are queued to endTurn every round so PC HP / concentration stays deterministic across the scenario (Bless concentration is never damage-tested).
  - Aldric starts wounded at 80/100 HP so R3 Lay on Hands (self) actually applies healing; the spec asked for LoH on Wizard but see GAP-P2-1.

GAP-P2-1: 'lay on hands on <ally>' is not currently supported. The class-ability target parser in packages/game-server/src/application/services/combat/tabletop/dispatch/class-ability-handlers.ts iterates monsters and NPCs only and explicitly filters out combatantType === 'Character', so PC-on-PC healing via tabletop text cannot be targeted. The executor (lay-on-hands-executor.ts) supports an ally target via params.targetEntityId + context.target, but the dispatcher never resolves those from a PC name. Workaround in this scenario: Aldric self-heals.

characters.comment: Brother Aldric: Devotion Paladin L5. CHA 16 (+3), STR 18 (+4). spellSaveDC 14, spellAttackBonus +6. Bless (R1) consumes L1 slot 4→3. Divine Smite (R2) consumes another L1 slot 3→2. Lay on Hands pool 25 HP (5 × level), used in R3 to heal Elara.
characters.name: Brother Aldric

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: After hit, expend spell slot + bonus action for 2d8 radiant (L1)

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Bonus action: heal from a 25-HP pool (5 × level)

characters.comment: Elara: Evocation Wizard L5. INT 18 (+4). spellSaveDC 15, spellAttackBonus +7. Casts Magic Missile (R1, L1 auto-hit), Scorching Ray (R2, L2, 3 beams), Fire Bolt (R3 cantrip, 2d10 at L5).
characters.name: Elara

characters.comment: Shadow: Thief Rogue L5. DEX 18 (+4). Shortbow +7, 1d6+4 piercing. Sneak Attack 3d6 server-applied when attacking with advantage OR when an ally is within 5 ft of the target (and Shadow has no disadvantage). Aldric at (10,10) is adjacent to all three monsters, so Shadow's shortbow fire at any of them qualifies for SA via ally adjacency.
characters.name: Shadow

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: 3d6 extra damage with advantage or ally within 5 ft of target

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action

monsters.comment: Ogre Champion. Spec said (15,10) / AC 11; moved to (11,10) adjacent to Aldric and bumped AC 11→15 so Paladin Extra-Attack auto-miss chain (natural-1 + 7 + Bless 1d4) still reliably misses. hp 120, Greatclub +6, 2d8+4.
monsters.name: Ogre Champion

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Soldier A. Spec said (20,10); moved to (11,11) adjacent to Aldric so Shadow's shortbow shot qualifies for Sneak Attack via ally adjacency. AC 18 keeps Aldric's potential chained miss rolls misses, and auto-chain natural-1 rolls against it are deterministic misses.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Soldier A

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Soldier B. Spec said (20,12); moved to (11,9) adjacent to Aldric for symmetric Sneak-Attack eligibility. Same stat block as A.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Soldier B

actions.comment: Queue endTurn for all three monsters across 4 rounds (3 monsters × 4 rounds = 12 entries). This keeps PC HP deterministic and protects Aldric's Bless concentration from concentration-check damage. With the queue empty after R4, the scenario has already reached its final assertions.

=== ROUND 1: BLESS PARTY + RANGED ATTACKS === Aldric initiates. DEX 10 (+0). Roll 20 → init 20 (guaranteed to beat ogre DEX −1 max 19 and hobgoblins DEX +1 max 21 most of the time; Elara DEX 14 +2 and Shadow DEX 18 +4 auto-roll separately — order between PCs handled by waitForTurn on each actor).

input.text: I raise my holy symbol over the party

actions.comment: Aldric initiative 20.
Wait for Aldric's R1 turn. (He may or may not be first — waitForTurn skips to him.)

R1 Aldric: cast Bless on self + Elara + Shadow. 'cast Bless' with no explicit target applies to all allies (appliesTo: 'allies'). Sets concentration: 'Bless', consumes L1 slot 4→3 (BUG-4/GAP-2 fixed today — Bless now correctly decrements a slot).
Assert Bless concentration active on Aldric.
Assert L1 slot consumed by Bless: 4 → 3.
Wait for Elara's R1 turn.
R1 Elara: Magic Missile (L1, auto-hit, 3 darts × 1d4+1 = 3d4+3 force ≈ 6–15 damage to Hobgoblin A). SIMPLE_ACTION_COMPLETE — no attack roll. Consumes L1 slot 4→3.

input.text: cast Magic Missile at Hobgoblin Soldier A

actions.comment: Assert Elara L1 slot consumed: 4 → 3.
Wait for Shadow's R1 turn.
R1 Shadow: shoot Hobgoblin Soldier A with Shortbow. Aldric at (10,10) is adjacent to Hobgoblin A at (11,11) → Sneak Attack eligible via ally adjacency. Bless adds +1d4 to Shadow's attack roll.

input.text: attack Hobgoblin Soldier A with Shortbow

actions.comment: Attack roll 15. Total: 15 + 7 + Bless 1d4 = 23–26 vs AC 18 → hit.
Damage roll 14 (weapon 1d6+4 + Sneak Attack 3d6 totalled by player). Server applies whatever damage it computed.
=== ROUND 2: PALADIN SMITES OGRE + WIZARD SCORCHING RAY + ROGUE SHORTBOW ===
R2 Aldric: attack Ogre Champion with Longsword. First attack is the primary; Extra Attack second swing auto-chains as a natural-1 miss after this attack completes.
Attack roll 14. Total: 14 + 7 + Bless 1d4 = 22–25 vs Ogre AC 15 → hit. Server should surface eligibleEnhancements with divine-smite.
Damage 6 weapon + 'with divine smite' → server adds 2d8 radiant and consumes L1 slot + bonus action. Extra Attack second swing auto-chains (natural 1 + 7 + Bless 1–4 = 9–12 vs AC 15 → miss).
Assert L1 slot consumed by Divine Smite: 3 → 2.
Bless concentration must still be active (Divine Smite is a class feature, not a spell cast, so no concentration contest).
R2 Elara: Scorching Ray at Ogre Champion — L2 slot, 3 separate attack rolls, each 2d6 fire on hit.
R2 Elara cast Scorching Ray at Ogre Champion. First of 3 rays will prompt for attack.

input.text: cast Scorching Ray at Ogre Champion

actions.comment: Ray 1 attack 15 + 7 + Bless = 23–26 vs AC 15 → hit.
Ray 1 damage 8 (2d6 fire) → chain to ray 2.
Ray 2 attack 15 → hit.
Ray 2 damage 8 → chain to ray 3.
Ray 3 attack 15 → hit.
Ray 3 damage 8 → action complete.
Assert Elara L2 slot consumed: 3 → 2.
R2 Shadow: shoot Ogre Champion with Shortbow. Aldric is adjacent to Ogre → Sneak Attack eligible.
R2 Shadow attack Ogre with Shortbow.
Attack 16 + 7 + Bless = 24–27 vs AC 15 → hit.
Damage 12 total (weapon + SA).
=== ROUND 3: LAY ON HANDS + PALADIN ATTACK (NO SMITE) + FIRE BOLT + ROGUE SHOT ===
R3 Aldric action: attack Ogre Champion with Longsword (no smite this round — save the slot, use bonus action for Lay on Hands).
Attack 13 + 7 + Bless = 21–24 vs AC 15 → hit.
Damage 5 weapon — NO smite keyword, no slot/bonus action consumed. Extra Attack auto-chain (natural 1 vs AC 15 with Bless → miss).
DIAGNOSTIC: verify Aldric is wounded before LoH self-heal. Setup currentHp was 80.

R3 Aldric bonus: Lay on Hands self-heal for 10 HP. Explicit amount supported (see healing-dice-regression). Decrements layOnHands pool 25 → 15. Aldric heals from 80 toward 100. GAP-P2-1: 'lay on hands on Elara' would be the spec'd flow but is unsupported by the current class-ability target parser — see scenario description.
Assert Lay on Hands pool decremented: 25 → 15.
Assert L1 slot unchanged this round (no smite): still 2/4.
Assert Aldric healed: 80 + 10 LoH = 90/100.
R3 Elara: Fire Bolt cantrip at Ogre Champion. 2d10 at L5, attack roll, no slot. Bless still applies to Elara's attack roll.
Cast Fire Bolt at Ogre.

input.text: cast Fire Bolt at Ogre Champion

actions.comment: Attack 14 + 7 + Bless = 22–25 vs AC 15 → hit.
Damage 12 (2d10).
Assert no spell slots consumed this round (cantrip is free): L1 still 3/4 for Elara (she used one L1 for Magic Missile in R1).
R3 Shadow: shoot Hobgoblin Soldier B (Aldric adjacent → SA eligible).
R3 Shadow attack Hobgoblin Soldier B with Shortbow.

input.text: attack Hobgoblin Soldier B with Shortbow

actions.comment: Attack 14 + 7 + Bless = 22–25 vs AC 18 → hit.
Damage 13 total (weapon + SA).
=== ROUND 4: FINAL STATE ASSERTIONS === No further actions — verify accumulated state.
Bless concentration persists on Aldric through the whole fight (no concentration damage since monsters endTurn every round).
Aldric L1 slots: R1 Bless 4→3, R2 Divine Smite 3→2, R3 attack with no smite (no change). Final: 2/4.
Aldric Lay on Hands pool: 25 − 10 (R3 heal on Elara) = 15/25.
Elara L1: R1 Magic Missile 4→3; R3 Fire Bolt is cantrip. Final: 3/4.
Elara L2: R2 Scorching Ray 3→2. Final: 2/3.
Ogre Champion took significant damage across R2+R3 (Smite + Scorching Ray + Shortbow + Fire Bolt). Broad bound — at least some damage, possibly downed.
Aldric healed to 90 by LoH in R3 (started 80 + 10 healed).
